name: ProEvent: An Event-centric Benchmark for Proactive Agents
summary: arXiv:2607.17701v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Proactive agents are expected to anticipate user needs and provide autonomous assistance by perceiving environmental context without explicit instruc...
description: arXiv:2607.17701v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Proactive agents are expected to anticipate user needs and provide autonomous assistance by perceiving environmental context without explicit instructions. A fundamental capability of such agents is to identify and track users' upcoming events, enabling continuous and event-specific assistance. For example, by recording the time and location of a...
author: Guanzhen Li, Liangming Pan, Leye Wang
